languages.text: {n}Джай сахарно улыбается техножрецу.{/n} "Сочту за комплимент, почтеннейший! Я буду польщена, если вы как-нибудь решите расширить мой кругозор в области наших общих интересов".
{n}Jae flashes the Tech-Priest a saccharine smile.{/n} "I'll take that as a compliment, venerable Master! I'd be delighted if you ever chose to expand my perspective regarding our mutual interests."
languages.original_text: {n}Джай сахарно улыбается техножрецу.{/n} "Сочту за комплимент, почтеннейший! Я буду польщена, если вы как-нибудь решите расширить мой кругозор в области наших общих интересов".

traits.locale_text: {n}Jae flashes the Tech-Priest a sugary smile.{/n} "I'll take that as a compliment, venerable Master! I'd be delighted if you ever chose to expand my perspective regarding our mutual interests."
{n}Jae flashes the Tech-Priest a sugary smile.{/n} "I'll take that as a compliment, venerable Master! I'd be delighted if you ever chose to expand my perspective regarding our mutual interests."
{n}Jae flashes the Tech-Priest a saccharine smile.{/n} "I'll take that as a compliment, venerable Master! I'd be delighted if you ever chose to expand my perspective regarding our mutual interests."
{n}Jae flashes the Tech-Priest a saccharine smile.{/n} "I'll take that as a compliment, venerable Master! I'd be delighted if you ever chose to expand my perspective regarding our mutual interests."

languages.text: {n}Jae lanza una sonrisa empalagosa al tecnosacerdote.{/n} «¡Me tomaré eso como un cumplido, venerable maestro! Me alegraría mucho si decidiera ampliar mi perspectiva respecto a nuestros mutuos intereses».
languages.original_text: {n}Jae flashes the Tech-Priest a saccharine smile.{/n} "I'll take that as a compliment, venerable Master! I'd be delighted if you ever chose to expand my perspective regarding our mutual interests."

traits.locale_text: {n}Jae lanza una sonrisa empalagosa al tecnosacerdote.{/n} «¡Me tomaré eso como un cumplido, venerable maestro! Me alegraría mucho si decidiera ampliar mi perspectiva respecto a nuestros mutuos intereses».

languages.text: {n}婕伊朝技术神甫绽开一个甜腻的微笑。{/n}“我就当这是夸奖了，可敬的大师！如果你哪天愿意帮我开开眼界，聊聊我们共同的兴趣，我一定求之不得。”
languages.original_text: {n}Jae flashes the Tech-Priest a saccharine smile.{/n} "I'll take that as a compliment, venerable Master! I'd be delighted if you ever chose to expand my perspective regarding our mutual interests."

traits.locale_text: {n}婕伊朝技术神甫绽开一个甜腻的微笑。{/n}“我就当这是夸奖了，可敬的大师！如果你哪天愿意帮我开开眼界，聊聊我们共同的兴趣，我一定求之不得。”

languages.text: {n}Jae schenkt dem Techpriester ein zuckersüßes Lächeln.{/n} "Ich werte das als Kompliment, ehrenwerter Meister. Ich würde mich freuen, wenn Ihr meine Perspektive hinsichtlich unserer gemeinsamen Interessen eines Tages erweitern würdet."
languages.original_text: {n}Jae flashes the Tech-Priest a saccharine smile.{/n} "I'll take that as a compliment, venerable Master! I'd be delighted if you ever chose to expand my perspective regarding our mutual interests."

traits.locale_text: {n}Jae schenkt dem Techpriester ein zuckersüßes Lächeln.{/n} "Ich werte das als Kompliment, ehrenwerter Meister. Ich würde mich freuen, wenn Ihr meine Perspektive hinsichtlich unserer gemeinsamen Interessen eines Tages erweitern würdet."

languages.text: {n}Jae adresse un sourire mielleux au technoprêtre.{/n} « Je vais prendre ça comme un compliment, vénérable maître ! Je serais ravie que vous choisissiez d'élargir mes perspectives quant à nos intérêts mutuels. »
languages.original_text: {n}Jae flashes the Tech-Priest a saccharine smile.{/n} "I'll take that as a compliment, venerable Master! I'd be delighted if you ever chose to expand my perspective regarding our mutual interests."

traits.locale_text: {n}Jae adresse un sourire mielleux au technoprêtre.{/n} « Je vais prendre ça comme un compliment, vénérable maître ! Je serais ravie que vous choisissiez d'élargir mes perspectives quant à nos intérêts mutuels. »

languages.text: {n}Jae, Tekno Rahip'e tatlı bir gülümseme atıyor.{/n} "Bunu iltifat olarak kabul edeceğim saygıdeğer Üstat! Karşılıklı ilgi alanlarımız konusunda bakış açımı genişletmeyi seçersen çok memnun olurum."
languages.original_text: {n}Jae flashes the Tech-Priest a saccharine smile.{/n} "I'll take that as a compliment, venerable Master! I'd be delighted if you ever chose to expand my perspective regarding our mutual interests."

traits.locale_text: {n}Jae, Tekno Rahip'e tatlı bir gülümseme atıyor.{/n} "Bunu iltifat olarak kabul edeceğim saygıdeğer Üstat! Karşılıklı ilgi alanlarımız konusunda bakış açımı genişletmeyi seçersen çok memnun olurum."

languages.text: {n}ジェイはテクプリストに甘美な笑顔を見せる。{/n}「それは褒め言葉ですね、尊敬するマスター！互いの利益に関する私の見解を拡大する機会を、いつか選んでいただけたら幸いです。」
languages.original_text: {n}Jae flashes the Tech-Priest a saccharine smile.{/n} "I'll take that as a compliment, venerable Master! I'd be delighted if you ever chose to expand my perspective regarding our mutual interests."

traits.locale_text: {n}ジェイはテクプリストに甘美な笑顔を見せる。{/n}「それは褒め言葉ですね、尊敬するマスター！互いの利益に関する私の見解を拡大する機会を、いつか選んでいただけたら幸いです。」
